title: Punishments
description: A simple punishments plugin aimed at small-medium sized servers
body:
**Descriptor**

A simple punishment plugin aimed at smaller - medium sized servers, allowing server admin and moderators to appropriately punish players that rule break on their server.  The plugin accomodates the use of warnings, kicks, mutes, bans (including tempbans). 

 



**Commands**


<details>
<summary>Command List</summary>

/ban [player] <reason> - Permanently ban a player from the server

/tempban [player] [duration] <reason> - Temporarily ban a player from the server

/mute [player] [duration] <reason> (note: if no duration is entered, this will permanently mute the player) - Mute a player

/unmute [player] - Unmute a player

/warn [player] <reason> - Warn a player

/kick [player] <reason> - Kick a player from the server

/report [player] <reason> - Report a player

/reloadpunishments - Reload the plugin

/punishmentsupdate - Update the plugin to the latest version (if one is available)

 * Reasons are not mandatory *

</details>



 



 **Permissions**


<details>
<summary>Permission List</summary>

/ban [player] <reason> - punish.ban

/tempban [player] [duration] <reason> - punish.tempban

/mute [player] [duration] <reason> - punish.mute

/unmute [player] - punish.unmute

/warn [player] <reason> - punish.warn

/kick [player] <reason> - punish.kick

/report [player] <reason> - punish.report

/reloadpunishments - punish.reload

/punishmentsupdate - punish.update (will also receive info on version-updates on login)

</details>

**Configuration**

<details>
<summary>Config settings & variables</summary>

Will be updated soon...

</details>


 

(The permission node **punish.notify** can be given to users/groups you wish to see broadcasts containing who has been punished & the permission node **punish.report.notify** can be given to users/groups you wish to see incoming reports)

**Support**

If you require any assistance, have any feedback, bugs to report or suggestions please leave a comment below and I will try to help you with your query.
